overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in red clothing walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City at night. The character travels from a covered walkway under an overpass, across wet streets, and into narrow industrial alleyways with graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk beneath the overpass, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars creating a covered walkway
distinctive orange paved pedestrian walkway with square tiles
large cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overpass structure
illuminated advertising screen mounted on the overpass structure
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an orange-tiled pedestrian walkway sheltered beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. Street lamps cast a warm glow on the wet tiles while digital billboards flicker in the background, creating a typical cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

events.description: exits the covered walkway and steps onto the open street intersection
black vehicle drives past on the wet road from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street while moving toward the opposite sidewalk, navigating around the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow bus parked or moving slowly in the distance near the intersection

entered.detail: rain-slicked black asphalt street reflecting the streetlights and neon signs
white painted zebra crossing lines on the road surface
large yellow public transit bus visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the city lights. A yellow bus is visible in the distance as the character crosses the street, and a black car passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk adjacent to multi-lane road

events.description: pedestrian with black umbrella passes by walking in the opposite direction
character turns slightly toward an industrial alley entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella, then approaching an industrial alleyway

notable_agents.action: person holding a black umbrella walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: gray concrete pedestrian walkway with curb and metal drainage grate
short black and yellow metal posts lining the edge of the sidewalk
low-rise industrial structure with corrugated metal walls and overgrown vegetation
tall palm tree visible against the night sky near the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the character passes a pedestrian carrying a black umbrella. The environment transitions from the open intersection to a more industrial area with metal buildings and overgrown grass, while cars continue to pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: enters narrow industrial alleyway away from the main street

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow industrial alley, passing by graffiti-covered walls and overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: large industrial building with red painted walls and small windows
wall covered in green and white graffiti tags and street art
tall dry grass and weeds growing along the building foundation
sloped concrete ramp leading up to a higher level or loading dock
chain-link fence with barbed wire topping near the industrial building

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow industrial alleyway flanked by a red building covered in graffiti on the right and overgrown vegetation on the left. The space is more enclosed and darker than the main street, with a concrete ramp visible ahead leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow graffiti-covered passage between industrial buildings

events.description: distant figure becomes visible standing in the alley ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow alley toward a figure standing in the distance, surrounded by graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: figure standing still in the middle of the alley facing the camera direction

entered.detail: tall bare concrete walls of the adjacent industrial structure
elevated pedestrian bridge or industrial walkway connecting buildings overhead
wooden utility pole with transformers and electrical equipment

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the narrow alleyway, passing concrete walls and under an overhead walkway. The red graffiti-covered wall continues on the right while a lone figure stands in the distance ahead, creating a focal point in the dimly lit industrial passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered urban walkway into the dark, enclosed depths of an industrial alleyway. It begins with the character walking along orange-tiled paths beneath a massive concrete overpass, where warm street lamps and flickering billboards illuminate the rain. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection of wet asphalt reflecting city lights, passing a yellow bus and a black car before moving along a sidewalk beside a pedestrian with an umbrella. The environment then shifts from the open road toward a more industrial zone of metal buildings and overgrown grass, eventually narrowing into a dim alleyway flanked by a red graffiti-covered wall and wild vegetation. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into this enclosed passage, moving under an overhead walkway toward a lone figure standing in the distance.
